issues.description: SearchDeck is incorrect for this effect. The card reveals from top of deck (not searching), then conditionally plays a Character. Should use RevealFromHand or a reveal+play pattern, not SearchDeck which implies deck searching.
Filter is incomplete. Must exclude [Sanji] by name. Current filter only checks cost; missing exclusion condition for character name.

Effect does not capture the 'reveal 1 card from top of deck' action followed by conditional play. The DSL must represent: (1) reveal top card, (2) if it's a Character cost ≤9 and not Sanji, play it; (3) otherwise return to bottom of deck.
